_comment: This is your control panel. Edit it directly in GitHub (pencil icon) to add feeds or keywords, commit, and the next run picks it up. Set a feed 'active' to false to mute it without deleting.

feeds.label: Google Alert - livestock
feeds.note: BEST catch-all. Google Alerts -> Deliver to = RSS feed -> paste URL. Make several.

feeds.label: EURAXESS
feeds.note: Run your search on euraxess.ec.europa.eu/jobs, copy the RSS link.

feeds.label: jobs.ac.uk
feeds.note: Each search page has an RSS icon; copy that feed.

feeds.label: Agristok-all
feeds.note: WordPress /feed/ = all posts. Verify in a browser.

feeds.label: Nature Careers
feeds.note: Nature Careers exposes RSS on search results.
